brief_notes: Solid single-pass paper with comprehensive methods section. All numbers verified: CRC02 88% F1 0->1.0, CRC22 91% 0.5->0.9, CRC03 67% 0.55->0.99, 14/17 LOH (~82%), CRC15 6% purity. Five well-organized tables (datasets, tools, TME F1, CNA summary, LOH summary, runtime). Discussion concise but covers main findings.
